rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE INNOCENTE CASSOLATO TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) To Jean Judnick
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is denied without prejudice. The parties must meet and confer no later than August 5. The respective requests for sanctions are denied. Petitioner Jean Judnick's counsel shall prepare the order. Any party wishing to appear to argue must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than July 22, 2014, at 3:00 p.m.
